summary: CAOS Shell redesign verification complete. All key features working correctly: Welcome state with centered hero, 4 feature cards with carousel navigation, left sidebar, bottom composer with model bar, account popover opens on right side, Working Context Strip appears on active threads but hidden in welcome state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAOS Shell redesign verified at 1920x1080 viewport. Welcome state shows centered 'Welcome to CAOS' hero with 4 feature cards in carousel (2 pages with dots), left sidebar with navigation, bottom composer with model bar. Account popover opens on right side via portal. Working Context Strip (5 chips: ARC, SENT, RECEIVED, FACTS, GLOBAL) appears only on active threads with messages, hidden in welcome state.

welcome_state_layout.details: Centered 'Welcome to CAOS' hero with subtitle and kicker text, 4 feature cards visible and not clipped

feature_cards.details: 4 cards visible (Create Image, Create Video, Create Mindmap, Chat with Multiple Models), all fully within viewport at 1920x1080

carousel_navigation.details: Left/right arrows work, 2 dot indicators, cards change on navigation (page 2: Search Anything, Analyze Data, Generate Content, Create & Design)

left_sidebar.details: ThreadRail at x=16, width=264px with CAOS branding, workspace nav, recent threads

bottom_composer.details: Composer at y=906, height=156px with textarea, upload, mic, send buttons

model_bar.details: Model bar visible with Smart Auto, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, More options

account_popover.details: Account trigger at bottom-left (x=31, y=793), popover opens on RIGHT side (x=1576) via portal, contains profile card, settings list

working_context_strip.details: Hidden in welcome state, visible after sending message with 5 chips (ARC, SENT, RECEIVED, FACTS, GLOBAL)

welcome_state_on_fresh_thread.details: New Chat button creates fresh thread showing welcome state

feature_card_action.details: Clicking 'Search Anything' card updates composer draft to 'Help me research'
